name: RLJ Lodging Trust $1.95 Series A Cumulative Convertible  Preferred Shares
summary: RLJ Lodging Trust $1.95 Series A Cumulative Convertible Preferred Shares represents a class of preferred equity offered by RLJ Lodging Trust. These shares provide investors with a cumulative dividend and can be converted into common shares under certain circumstances, and holders have a higher claim on assets than common stockholders in the event of liquidation. Specific terms and conditions are available in the company's filings.
